case_title: ANTONIO GUTIERREZ VS. LEANDRO DESOUZA VIEIRA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
CORRESPONDENCE PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED A NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FORM TO INFORM THE COURT RE SERVICE. RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, ANTONIO
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,260.00 FILED BY GUTIERREZ, ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT VIEIRA, LEANDRO DESOUZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
